volume_info.title: Cinematic Composition & Spatial Geometry
volume_info.description: Mathematical and artistic organization of elements within the frame.

geometry_rules.name: Golden Ratio (Fibonacci)
geometry_rules.logic: 1.618 ratio spiral leading to the primary focal point.
geometry_rules.use_case: High-end luxury and organic visual flow.

geometry_rules.name: Rule of Thirds
geometry_rules.logic: 3x3 grid alignment with subject on intersection points.
geometry_rules.use_case: Balanced storytelling and negative space for branding.

geometry_rules.name: Central Symmetry
geometry_rules.logic: Subject centered at (50,50) for absolute dominance.
geometry_rules.use_case: Hero shots, power, and high-impact product reveals.

geometry_rules.name: Leading Lines
geometry_rules.logic: Diagonal or converging lines pointing to the subject.
geometry_rules.use_case: Industrial depth, pipelines, and perspective shots.

geometry_rules.name: Frame Within Frame
geometry_rules.logic: Using environmental structures to border the subject.
geometry_rules.use_case: Creating depth and focus in complex scenes.

geometry_rules.name: Triangle Composition
geometry_rules.logic: Arranging three points of interest for stability and strength.
geometry_rules.use_case: Grouped products or multi-element industrial setups.

geometry_rules.name: Heavy Negative Space
geometry_rules.logic: Subject occupying less than 20% of the frame.
geometry_rules.use_case: Minimalist luxury, isolation, and premium feel.
